meta.title: Malware on ICS
meta.description:
In this S4x20 clip, Ben Goerz gives 3 examples of malware they found in their OT environment. It is from his Threat Hunting with What You Have session.

They found something as simple and available as DNS logs to be helpful for this, and gave some other examples in the full video. #otsecurity #icssecurity
